/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/tst_threading.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/tst_threading.dir/tst_threading_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tst_threading.dir/tst_threading.cpp.o -o tst_threading  ../src/libSqliteSyncProLib.a /usr/lib64/libQt6Test.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6Network.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6Sql.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libcrypto.so /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
